component
=========




Hierarchy
---------

**Valid Parent Blocks:**

- :doc:`item`
- :doc:`entity`


ID Properties
-------------

The ID of this block counts as the block type.

**Allowed ID Values:**

- ``CraftRecipe``
- ``SpriteConfig``
- ``UiConfig``
- ``CraftBench``
- ``CraftBenchSounds``
- ``Resources``
- ``DryingCraftLogic``
- ``SpriteOverlayConfig``
- ``Durability``
- ``FluidContainer``
- ``ContextMenuConfig``
- ``WallCoveringConfig``
